name: kaseya-spanning-backup-mcp
description: Query and manage Kaseya Spanning Backup for M365, Google Workspace, and Salesforce — for MSP data-protection AI agents.
long_description: Use this server when you need to inspect or trigger Spanning SaaS backup operations. List backed-up users and their per-service status, enumerate daily backup runs, queue point-in-time restore jobs for individual users or items, poll restore job status, search the audit log for backup/restore events, and view license seat usage. Supports M365, Google Workspace, and Salesforce platforms via platform-scoped HTTP Basic auth (admin email + API token pair).

spanning_admin_email.title: Spanning Admin Email
spanning_admin_email.description: The admin email the Spanning API token is bound to. Both must match what was issued in the Spanning admin console.

spanning_api_token.title: Spanning API Token
spanning_api_token.description: API token issued from the Spanning admin console. Pair-bound to the admin email; any mismatch surfaces as a generic 401.

spanning_platform.title: Spanning Platform (optional)
spanning_platform.description: Optional. Which Spanning product the token targets. Leave blank to use the default (m365 → https://o365-api.spanningbackup.com/external). Other values: gws (→ https://api.spanningbackup.com/external), salesforce (→ https://salesforce-api.spanningbackup.com). Tokens cannot cross platforms.

spanning_api_url.title: Spanning API Base URL (optional)
spanning_api_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default derived from spanning_platform. Only set for staging/sovereign shards.
